name: Ketanserin
description: Ketanserin has been investigated for the treatment of Septic Shock, Severe Sepsis, and Diabetic Foot Ulcer.

interactions.name: Urokinase
interactions.description: Ketanserin may increase the anticoagulant activities of Urokinase.
